title: Filter array by property
description: Filter an array to only items matching a condition. Returns a new array.

title: Map array to property values
description: Transform every element in an array. The Swiss army knife of array operations.

command: const sum = arr.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.{VALUE}, 0);
title: Reduce array to single value
description: Fold an array into a single value. Powerful but often misused.

title: Destructure object
description: Extract multiple properties in one line. Destructuring is one of JS's best features.

title: Merge objects with spread
description: Merge two objects into a new one. Later keys overwrite earlier ones.

title: Optional chaining with nullish fallback
description: Safely access nested properties without crashing if something is null/undefined.

title: Fetch and parse JSON
description: The modern way to make API calls. Promise-based, async/await compatible.

title: Run promises in parallel
description: Execute multiple promises concurrently. Faster than awaiting one by one.

title: Flatten nested array
description: Flatten an array of any depth. Infinity means all the way down.

title: Remove duplicates from array
description: Deduplicate an array in one line using Set. Clever and concise.

title: Group array by property
description: Group array items by a common property. SQL GROUP BY but in JavaScript.

title: Deep clone an object
description: Native deep clone (ES2022+). Faster than JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(x)) and handles more types.

title: Sort array of objects by string
description: Sort objects alphabetically by a string property, locale-aware.

title: Debounce pattern
description: Every call resets the timer. fn() only fires after calls stop for DELAY_MS. The pattern behind every search input.

title: Store/retrieve JSON from localStorage
description: Persist data across page loads. JSON.stringify/parse handles non-string values.

title: Copy text to clipboard (async)
description: Modern Clipboard API. Works on HTTPS. Simpler than the old execCommand dance.

title: Find first matching item
description: Get the first item matching a condition, or undefined. Use findIndex for the position.

title: Template literal string
description: String interpolation in JS. Use backticks, insert variables with ${}.

title: Iterate object entries
description: Loop over key-value pairs with destructuring. Clean and readable.

command:
const hasMatch = arr.some(x => x.{PROPERTY} > {VALUE});
const allMatch = arr.every(x => x.{PROPERTY} > {VALUE});
title: Check if any/all match condition
description: some() = at least one. every() = all of them. Boolean returns only.

title: Nullish assignment (??=)
description: Only assign if the property is null or undefined. ES2021 logical assignment operator.

title: Display array as table in console
description: Renders arrays of objects as a formatted table in DevTools. Vastly underused.

title: Find all regex matches
description: Get all matches of a pattern. The /g flag returns all occurrences.

command:
const value = condition && expensiveCall();
const fallback = value || 'default';
title: Short-circuit evaluation
description: && evaluates right side only if left is truthy. || uses right if left is falsy.

title: Type-safe error handling
description: Check error type before handling. In TypeScript, caught errors are unknown — always narrow the type first.

title: Safe async pattern (no library)
description: Handle async errors without try/catch. Returns { data, error } tuple. No external library needed.

title: Immutable object (Object.freeze)
description: Create a shallow-frozen object. Properties cannot be added, removed, or changed. For deep freeze, recurse.

title: Negative index array access (ES2022)
description: Access elements from the end without arr[arr.length - 1]. at(-1) = last, at(-2) = second to last.
